Project.NAME: japan-travel-rag-mcp
Project.keywords: japan-travel, mcp, fastmcp, hono, proxy, tg-chat-rag, oauth, logto, mcp-auth, jose, admin-ui, postgres, drizzle, contract-first
Project.annotation: Target runtime architecture uses FastMCP HTTP stream for /mcp with mcp-auth-backed authenticate adapter and Hono-mounted /admin routes. OAuth discovery metadata is exposed through FastMCP oauth configuration.

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Runtime config validation for FastMCP runtime, admin authentication, OAuth resource-server settings, and upstream tg-chat-rag integration.

fn-loadConfig.description: Validate env and return typed AppConfig

type-AppConfig.description: Configuration object including tg-chat-rag, ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN, FastMCP runtime settings, and OAuth issuer/audience/requiredScopes

M-LOGGER.NAME: Logger
M-LOGGER.purpose: Structured logging for boot lifecycle, auth decisions, admin surface events, and upstream failures.

M-DB.NAME: DrizzleDb
M-DB.purpose: Initialize and expose Drizzle PostgreSQL client from DATABASE_URL for current and future persistence modules.

fn-createDb.description: Create Drizzle database client and connection pool

M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS.NAME: ToolContracts
M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS.purpose: Schema and allowlist registry for MCP tools proxied in v1 with Standard Schema compatible definitions.

schema-SearchMessagesInputPublic.description: Public search_messages schema that forbids filters.chat_ids

const-PROXIED_TOOL_NAMES.description: Allowed tools: search_messages, get_message_context, get_related_messages, list_sources

M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT.NAME: TgChatRagClient
M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT.purpose: HTTP adapter for tg-chat-rag methods API with service-level Bearer token authentication.

fn-callMethod.description: POST to /api/v1/methods/<tool_name> and return parsed response

type-UpstreamCallError.description: Normalized error payload for timeout, auth, and protocol failures

M-MCP-AUTH-PROVIDER.NAME: McpAuthProvider
M-MCP-AUTH-PROVIDER.purpose: Initialize mcp-auth with Logto OIDC discovery and expose framework-agnostic verification + metadata context.

fn-initMcpAuth.description: Async init: fetch Logto OIDC metadata, create MCPAuth context, expose verify/issuer utilities and metadata payloads

type-McpAuthContext.description: Initialized auth context with verifyAccessToken, validateIssuer, metadata payloads, and resource metadata URL

M-MCP-AUTH-ADAPTER.NAME: McpAuthAdapter
M-MCP-AUTH-ADAPTER.purpose: Bridge mcp-auth token verification to FastMCP authenticate(request) contract and emit typed auth session.

fn-authenticateFastMcpRequest.description: Parse Authorization header, verify token, validate issuer/audience/scopes, return session or throw auth response

type-McpAuthSession.description: Typed auth payload for FastMCP tool session context

M-ADMIN-AUTH.NAME: AdminAuth
M-ADMIN-AUTH.purpose: Authenticate admin login attempts using ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN and enforce admin session cookie checks.

fn-authenticateAdmin.description: Validate login token and issue signed session cookie

fn-requireAdminSession.description: Allow admin request or return redirect decision

M-TOOL-PROXY.NAME: ToolProxyService
M-TOOL-PROXY.purpose: Tool-level proxy orchestration: validate input, enforce internal chat scope, forward request, normalize response.

fn-executeTool.description: Main proxy execution function for all exposed MCP tools

fn-buildSearchPayload.description: Inject filters.chat_ids from config and reject external chat_ids

M-ADMIN-UI.NAME: AdminUiRoutes
M-ADMIN-UI.purpose: Render Bun JSX admin pages and HTMX fragments for operator login and OAuth diagnostics.

fn-renderAdminLayout.description: Render admin layout with OAuth ops tab

M-API-KEY-REPOSITORY.NAME: ApiKeyRepository
M-API-KEY-REPOSITORY.purpose: Persist and query API key lifecycle records used for MCP Bearer authentication.

fn-createApiKeyRepository.description: Build repository for API key create/list/revoke/resolve lifecycle operations

type-ApiKeyRecord.description: Public API key metadata shape for admin and auth layers

M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME.NAME: FastMcpRuntime
M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME.purpose: Create FastMCP runtime, register proxy tools, configure oauth metadata endpoints, and mount /admin routes on underlying Hono app.
M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME.depends: M-CONFIG, M-LOGGER, M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS, M-TOOL-PROXY, M-MCP-AUTH-ADAPTER, M-ADMIN-UI

fn-createFastMcpRuntime.description: Build FastMCP instance with httpStream/oAuth/authenticate configuration

fn-registerProxyTools.description: Register supported tool set and connect handlers to ToolProxyService

M-SERVER.NAME: ServerMain
M-SERVER.purpose: Process entrypoint with async mcp-auth init, FastMCP runtime boot sequence, and lifecycle control.
M-SERVER.depends: M-CONFIG, M-LOGGER, M-DB, M-MCP-AUTH-PROVIDER, M-MCP-AUTH-ADAPTER, M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT, M-TOOL-PROXY, M-ADMIN-AUTH, M-ADMIN-UI, M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME

fn-main.description: Boot server dependencies and start FastMCP HTTP stream runtime

M-ROOT-ENTRYPOINT.NAME: RootEntrypoint
M-ROOT-ENTRYPOINT.purpose: Root runtime bootstrap that invokes server main and maps fatal startup failures to process exit code.

fn-bootstrap.description: Run server main() and handle fatal startup errors

M-MCP-AUTH-ADAPTER-TEST.NAME: McpAuthAdapterTests
M-MCP-AUTH-ADAPTER-TEST.purpose: Unit verification of mcp-auth adapter decision mapping for FastMCP authenticate hook.

fn-McpAuthAdapterTests.description: Checks missing header, invalid token, insufficient scope, valid token, and error response behavior

M-SERVER-INTEGRATION-TEST.NAME: ServerIntegrationTests
M-SERVER-INTEGRATION-TEST.purpose: Integration verification of FastMCP discovery/auth flow, admin routing, and authorized MCP dispatch.

fn-ServerIntegrationTests.description: Validates well-known metadata, auth challenge/allow behavior, admin routes, and tool dispatch

M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME-SMOKE.NAME: FastMcpRuntimeSmokeTests
M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME-SMOKE.purpose: Smoke verification for FastMCP tool registration and denied/allowed dispatch behavior.

fn-FastMcpRuntimeSmokeTests.description: Checks tool list/dispatch behavior and schema validation at runtime boundary

M-CONFIG-TEST.NAME: ConfigTests
M-CONFIG-TEST.purpose: Validation of OAuth/public runtime config parsing defaults and strict error behavior.

fn-ConfigParsingTests.description: Verifies config defaults, overrides, and CONFIG_VALIDATION_ERROR conditions

M-ADMIN-UI-OPS-TEST.NAME: AdminUiOpsRouteTests
M-ADMIN-UI-OPS-TEST.purpose: Stability verification for admin login/session and ops routes.

fn-AdminUiOpsRouteTests.description: Checks login/session redirects and ops rendering

M-DOCKER-DEV.NAME: DockerComposeDev
M-DOCKER-DEV.purpose: Development container orchestration for MCP server with local source mount and .env loading.

cfg-mcp-service.description: Single mcp service running bun run index.ts with healthcheck

M-DOCKER-PROD.NAME: DockerComposeProd
M-DOCKER-PROD.purpose: Production container orchestration for MCP server with required runtime env vars and external network.

cfg-mcp-service.description: Single mcp service running bun run index.ts on external coolify network

M-DOCKER-IMAGE.NAME: DockerImage
M-DOCKER-IMAGE.purpose: Container image build definition for MCP HTTP server runtime.

cfg-release-stage.description: Builds Bun runtime image with sources and production dependencies

M-MCP-AUTH-GUARD.NAME: McpAuthGuard (DELETED)
M-MCP-AUTH-GUARD.reason: Replaced by M-MCP-AUTH-ADAPTER for FastMCP authenticate flow

M-TRANSPORT.NAME: McpTransport (DELETED)
M-TRANSPORT.reason: Replaced by M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME FastMCP registration/dispatch layer

M-TRANSPORT-SMOKE.NAME: TransportSmokeTests (DELETED)
M-TRANSPORT-SMOKE.reason: Replaced by FastMCP runtime smoke tests

M-OAUTH-JWKS.NAME: OAuthJwksClient (DELETED)
M-OAUTH-JWKS.reason: Replaced by jose via mcp-auth TokenVerifier

M-OAUTH-DISCOVERY.NAME: OAuthDiscoveryRoutes (DELETED)
M-OAUTH-DISCOVERY.reason: Replaced by runtime-served oauth metadata endpoints

DF-ADMIN-LOGIN.NAME: admin login flow
DF-ADMIN-LOGIN.step-2: M-ADMIN-AUTH validates token and sets signed admin session cookie.

DF-ADMIN-GUARD.NAME: admin route guard flow
DF-ADMIN-GUARD.step-1: Request targets /admin/* route mounted on FastMCP Hono app.

DF-OAUTH-DISCOVERY.NAME: oauth protected resource discovery flow
DF-OAUTH-DISCOVERY.step-2: M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME serves metadata from FastMCP oauth protectedResource + authorizationServer config.
DF-OAUTH-DISCOVERY.step-3: Client initiates OAuth authorization at Logto.

DF-MCP-AUTH.NAME: mcp oauth auth flow
DF-MCP-AUTH.step-1: Client calls /mcp with Authorization Bearer access token.
DF-MCP-AUTH.step-2: FastMCP invokes authenticate(request) before tool dispatch.
DF-MCP-AUTH.step-3: M-MCP-AUTH-ADAPTER verifies token via M-MCP-AUTH-PROVIDER and validates issuer/audience/scopes.
DF-MCP-AUTH.step-4: Denied request returns 401/403 challenge; authorized request proceeds with auth session context.

DF-PROXY-SEARCH.NAME: search_messages proxy flow
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-1: Authorized MCP caller invokes search_messages without chat_ids input.
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-2: M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME validates input schema and invokes tool handler.
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-3: M-TOOL-PROXY injects chat IDs from TG_CHAT_RAG_CHAT_IDS and forwards to upstream.
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-4: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

DF-PROXY-CONTEXT.NAME: get_message_context proxy flow
DF-PROXY-CONTEXT.step-2: M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME validates payload and routes to M-TOOL-PROXY.
DF-PROXY-CONTEXT.step-3: Upstream response is returned to caller in MCP format.

DF-PROXY-RELATED.NAME: get_related_messages proxy flow
DF-PROXY-RELATED.step-2: M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME validates payload and routes to M-TOOL-PROXY.
DF-PROXY-RELATED.step-3: Upstream response is returned to caller in MCP format.

DF-PROXY-SOURCES.NAME: list_sources proxy flow
DF-PROXY-SOURCES.step-2: M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME validates payload and routes to M-TOOL-PROXY.
DF-PROXY-SOURCES.step-3: Upstream response is returned to caller in MCP format.

CrossLink.relation: reads runtime config for log setup
uses DATABASE_URL to initialize Drizzle PostgreSQL client
emits db initialization and connectivity diagnostics
persists API key records through Drizzle database client
emits repository lifecycle and failure diagnostics
uses ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN for login validation
emits admin auth success and failure events
reads OAUTH_ISSUER, OAUTH_AUDIENCE, OAUTH_REQUIRED_SCOPES, PUBLIC_URL for auth init
emits auth provider initialization and metadata fetch diagnostics
uses provider context for token verification and issuer validation
uses audience and required scopes for authorization checks
logs FastMCP authenticate allow/deny decisions
enforces admin session guard on protected UI routes
renders OAuth config diagnostics for operators
emits admin route and HTMX action logs
emits schema validation diagnostics
uses base URL, bearer token, and timeout settings
emits upstream request and failure logs
reads TG_CHAT_RAG_CHAT_IDS for enforced search scope
validates tool inputs and enforces allowlist
forwards validated tool calls to upstream methods API
emits proxy decisions and error mapping logs
uses runtime transport and OAuth settings during FastMCP bootstrap
registers FastMCP tools with validated schemas
routes FastMCP tool handlers to proxy execution
maps provider metadata into FastMCP OAuth authorization/protected-resource config
uses authenticate hook for /mcp authorization
emits runtime startup and dispatch diagnostics
reads server and auth settings
initializes database client before runtime startup
imports admin route handler for delegated /admin mounting
calls initMcpAuth() at startup
constructs authenticate dependency from provider context
creates upstream client for proxied MCP tool execution
creates tool proxy service used by FastMCP handlers
starts and stops FastMCP runtime
emits boot and shutdown logs
invokes server main bootstrap
imports AppConfig type for adapter test dependency fixtures
imports Logger type for adapter test dependency fixtures
verifies authenticate decision mapping and challenge behavior
mocks auth provider context for isolated adapter tests
imports AppConfig type for deterministic integration dependency fixtures
imports Logger type for deterministic integration dependency fixtures
uses authenticate adapter in integration harness request flow
imports McpAuthContext type for auth dependency fixtures
builds FastMCP runtime for end-to-end metadata/admin/mcp assertions
mocks ToolProxyService for authorized MCP dispatch assertions
verifies FastMCP tool registration and routing smoke behavior
imports AppConfig type for smoke runtime fixtures
imports Logger type for smoke runtime fixtures
imports McpAuthContext type for auth fixture wiring
uses ToolProxyService mock for authorized tools/call dispatch assertions
verifies runtime config parsing and validation conditions
verifies admin route stability
imports AppConfig fixture types for ops route rendering tests
imports Logger fixture types for route diagnostics tests
packages server runtime entrypoint into deployment image
injects runtime environment consumed by config loader
runs MCP server process in development container profile
provides runtime env variables for config loading in development profile
builds MCP runtime image from local Dockerfile in development profile
runs MCP server process in production container profile
provides required runtime env variables for production config loading
builds MCP runtime image from Dockerfile for production deployment
